# FP Fixture: Bibliography-order citations in External Voices

## External Voices

- Popper, *The Logic of Scientific Discovery* (1934). Falsifiability
  as the foundation of scientific method.
- Flyvbjerg et al., "Underestimating Costs in Public Works" (2002).
  Reference class forecasting basis.
- Tetlock & Gardner, *Superforecasting* (2015). Calibration discipline.
- Kahneman & Tversky, "Intuitive Prediction" (1979). Planning fallacy.
